appearance.clothing: Black leather tactical suit with yellow inner lining, black leather forearm armor.
appearance.weapon: None, uses 灵力回路 for combat.

char_description.overview: A close-quarters fighter whose thorns harden the more they break. Protective, quick to anger, emotionally transparent.
char_description.combat_style: Close-quarters brawler using thorns as primary weapons. Shatters and regenerates thorns mid-combat, exploiting the hardening cycle.

char_personality.strengths: Instinctive close-combat judgment, sustained pressure; High pain tolerance.
char_personality.flaws: Acts before thinking, easily provoked; Blusters and lashes out when his insecurities are prodded; Inserts himself into everything 雨 does.
char_personality.quirks: Rubs his thumb along the edge of his forearm armor when restless.

char_background.origin: Abandoned at eleven when white thorns erupted from his awakening 灵力回路, he was taken in by a secret orphanage run by 灵能者 for children rejected for their 灵力, where he met 雨. They grew up as siblings and at nineteen took the 狩灵协会 exam: she received 3阶, he received 2阶. The examiner's dismissive attitude toward 雨 enraged him. He confronted the examiner, then took 雨 and left. That day they met a woman catching a falling cat with silkworm silk; 雨 persuaded him to join her firm.
char_background.current_mission: Handle combat commissions for 来生事务所. Keep 雨 safe, even though she is the calmer one.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Average, moderate 灵力 for sustained 灵力回路 use.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Average, can perceive all entities regardless of disguise.
char_basic_abilities.身体素质: Excellent, physical capabilities far surpassing ordinary people.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-灭烬: When the circuit is activated, white thorns grow from the forearm armor and knuckles. Thorns start at moderate strength and light in color. Each time they are shattered or broken and subsequently regenerate, they grow progressively harder and darker, blackening from the root outward. Once fully black, they reach steel-like hardness and razor sharpness. Thorns exist only while the circuit remains active and dissipate upon deactivation.

char_relationships.雨: The younger sister he grew up with in the same orphanage. Protective to the point of smothering, her deliberate distance stings in ways he cannot name. Followed her into 来生事务所, though he would never say that was the reason.
char_relationships.爱: Met her on a street corner after leaving the 狩灵协会, catching a cat falling from a tree with a net woven from her silkworm silk. He would never admit it, but he trusts her judgment. Takes the combat work she will not touch.
char_relationships.星流: Quiet kid at the office who keeps to herself. Leaves snacks on her desk without a word and walks away. She keeps her distance, and he returns the favor.
char_relationships.来生事务所: The place that took him in when he had nowhere else to go. Still settling into the rhythm of working with people instead of against them.
char_relationships.狩灵协会: Took the exam alongside 雨, she received 3阶 and he received 2阶. The examiner's dismissiveness toward 雨 drove him to confront them and walk out. Has not looked back since, but he has never forgotten the examiner's attitude that day.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 他把指关节按得咔咔响，小臂铠甲上白色棘刺缓缓顶出，尖端在路灯下泛着哑光。他向前迈了一步，"你再说一遍试试。"
他从巷口冲进来，甚至没看清有几只，棘刺已经从小臂铠甲上炸开，白色尖锋划过砖墙擦出一串火星。他挡在雨身前，"退后。"

char_dialogue_examples.situation: 在事务所接到战斗委托
char_dialogue_examples.response: 他靠在事务所门框上听完委托内容，从门框上直起身，"我接了。"瞥了爱一眼，补了一句，"不用叫雨，我一个人就行。"
